---
title: "Worked Example - Bird Migration"
author: "Katy Brown"
format: html
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
```

Read the bird breeding site data frame and look at it with `gt()`.

```{r}
bird_breeding_sites <- read_csv("data/breeding_site_locations.csv")

gt(bird_breeding_sites)
```

Preview the data with `glimpse()`.

```{r}
glimpse(bird_breeding_sites)
```

Read the bird migration site data.
```{r}
bird_migration_sites <- read_csv("data/migratory_connectivity_dataset.csv")
gt(head(bird_migration_sites))
```
Summarise the data frame

```{r}
glimpse(bird_migration_sites)
```

Filter columns in bird_breeding_sites data frame

```{r}
bird_breeding_selected <- bird_breeding_sites |>
  select(Site, Longitude, Latitude) |>
  distinct() |>
  rename(Breeding_Longitude = Longitude, Breeding_Latitude = Latitude)

gt(bird_breeding_selected)
```

Filter columns in bird_migration_sites data frame

```{r}
bird_migration_selected <- bird_migration_sites |>
  select(Site,
         winterLongitude,
         winterLatitude,
         pslon,
         pslat,
         iblon,
         iblat,
         awestlon,
         awestlat) |>
  unique() |>
  rename(
    Winter_Longitude = winterLongitude,
    Winter_Latitude = winterLatitude,
    Stopover_Longitude = pslon,
    Stopover_Latitude = pslat,
    Iberian_Longitude = iblon,
    Iberian_Latitude = iblat,
    Westmost_Longitude = awestlon,
    Westmost_Latitude = awestlat
  )

gt(head(bird_migration_selected))
```
